## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new capability (MINOR bump)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix (PATCH bump)
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `ci` — CI / workflows
- [ ] `chore` — repo maintenance (incl. upstream sync)
- [ ] `refactor` — restructuring without behavior change

## Affected component

- [ ] Marketplace (root manifest, scaffolding)
- [ ] `n8n-skills` plugin
- [ ] `gtm-skills` plugin

## Scope check

- [ ] This PR does NOT modify content under `*/skills/` (those changes go upstream at the original repos)
- [ ] This PR does NOT contain secrets, credentials, API keys, or PII
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (root for marketplace-level, per-plugin for plugin-level)
- [ ] All CI checks pass locally
